---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.top-hero}
# Conner Robertson {#home-name}

![](images/IMG_3170.jpeg){.profile-photo}

::: {.button-row}
[Email](mailto:robertco@lawrence.edu){.home-btn}
[GitHub](https://github.com/connerrob24/){.home-btn target="_blank"}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/conner-robertson-3297532b8/){.home-btn target="_blank"}
:::
:::

##

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### Resume

<i class="bi bi-file-earmark"></i> View my <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1v8BbmGckoAS4CYBgHNIV4Q_UR9RSjBW_/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Resume</a>

:::

::: {.project-card}
### Shiny App Project
Major League Baseball pitching percentile rankings analysis.

<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> <a
href="https://jxajm8-conner-robertson.shinyapps.io/project/" target="_blank">Learn More</a>

:::

::: {.project-card}
### Background
Learn more about my interests and professional goals.

<i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> <a
href="about.qmd" target="_blank">About Me</a>

:::

::: {.project-card .static-card}
### My Portfolio
A small collection of moments I have captured.

<i class="bi bi-camera"></i> <a
href="photography.qmd" target="_blank">View Portfolio</a>

:::

:::
